title: Commercial real-estate worries weigh down property ETFs — but a ‘durable' corner holds up relatively well
text: Hello! This week's ETF wrap looks at real estate funds with exposure to commercial properties, an area of the market under pressure as investors worry lending is tightening after this month's stress in the banking sector.

title: Prologis: Leading The Way In Industrial Real Estate
text: Prologis, as the market leader with a market cap of $100bn in the industrial real estate sector, is a major player in the thriving industrial real estate market. Prologis benefits from favorable trends, including the growth of e-commerce and the reshoring of manufacturing, which are driving demand for industrial properties.

title: 3 Reasons Why Prologis Is Worth Buying
text: Prologis is a REIT specializing in logistics real estate with $196 billion in assets under management. It is an international company with about 6,600 clients in 19 countries. Its top ten customers are well-known quality companies such as Amazon, FedEx, DHL, UPS, etc.

title: Prologis' Shares To Face Pressure In A Rising Interest Rate Environment
text: PLD is a leading global logistics REIT, providing high-quality industrial properties across 19 countries, catering to diverse tenants such as Amazon, UPS, DHL, and XPO Logistics.
